name: @acme-skunkworks/versioned-package-template
description: Template repository for Acme Skunkworks versioned, content-only (non-npm) packages.

scripts.ci:watch: gh run watch $(gh run list -L 1 --json databaseId -q '.[0].databaseId // empty')
scripts.lint:sh: bash -c 'if command -v shellcheck >/dev/null 2>&1; then shellcheck infrastructure/scripts/*.sh .husky/pre-commit .husky/pre-push .husky/commit-msg; elif [ "$(uname -s)" = "Darwin" ]; then echo "⚠️  shellcheck not installed — skipping. Install: brew install shellcheck"; else echo "⚠️  shellcheck not installed — skipping. Install: apt-get install shellcheck"; fi'
scripts.test:sh: bash -c 'if command -v bats >/dev/null 2>&1; then bats infrastructure/tests/*.bats; elif [ "$(uname -s)" = "Darwin" ]; then echo "⚠️  bats not installed — skipping. Install: brew install bats-core"; else echo "⚠️  bats not installed — skipping. Install: apt-get install bats"; fi'

**/*.{yml,yaml}: bash -c 'if command -v yamllint >/dev/null 2>&1; then yamllint "$@"; elif [ "$(uname -s)" = "Darwin" ]; then echo "⚠️  yamllint not installed — skipping. Install with: brew install yamllint"; else echo "⚠️  yamllint not installed — skipping. Install with: pip install --user yamllint==1.37.1"; fi' --
.github/workflows/*.{yml,yaml}: bash -c 'if command -v actionlint >/dev/null 2>&1; then actionlint "$@"; elif [ "$(uname -s)" = "Darwin" ]; then echo "⚠️  actionlint not installed — skipping. Install with: brew install actionlint"; else echo "⚠️  actionlint not installed — skipping. Install via: bash <(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rhysd/actionlint/v1.7.5/scripts/download-actionlint.bash)"; fi' --
